# Dralvo

> Dralvo Capital builds verified automated gold (XAUUSD) trading robots — "Expert Advisors" — for the MetaTrader 5 platform. Strategies are tested on real market data with full transparency: no martingale, no grid, hard stop-losses on every trade. Website: https://www.dralvo.com

## What Dralvo is
Dralvo is a trading-software product company. It distributes MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisors (automated trading robots) for the XAUUSD (gold vs. US dollar) market, plus a free in-browser position-size & risk calculator and a publicly published track record. Dralvo does not manage money, is not a fund, and does not sell "guaranteed-profit" signals.

## Products (MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisors for XAUUSD)
- **Dralvo GoldMaster** — D1 (daily) swing system. Long-only, trend-following; uses CFTC Commitment of Traders positioning as a filter and can stay idle for long stretches when gold is bearish (capital preservation by design).
- **Dralvo GoldScalp** — M15 (15-minute) momentum scalper. Every trade has a hard stop-loss and a time-stop. No grid, no martingale.
- **Dralvo TiGold** — a free, adaptive XAUUSD robot available at no cost through the Dralvo IB (introducing-broker) partnership.

All robots run on Windows via MetaTrader 5 and are verified on real / 100%-real-tick historical data. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

## Pricing (USD)
- **Free — $0.** Get the TiGold robot free by opening a real MT5 account through the Dralvo IB link. Includes 1 IB-verified live MT5 account, 1 demo account for 30 days, the free position-size & risk calculator, and the Telegram community.
- **Dralvo Unlimited — $59/month, $318/6 months, or $599/year.** Includes all three robots (GoldMaster, GoldScalp, TiGold), unlimited MT5 accounts, Telegram VIP, continuous updates, install support, 1 VPS, early access to new robots, and priority support.

## Key differentiators
- No martingale, no grid, no averaging-down — every trade is risk-managed with a hard stop-loss.
- Radical transparency: the full backtest and honest expectations (win rate, longest losing streak, maximum drawdown) are published openly rather than hidden.
- Free position-size & risk calculator runs in the browser with no account required.
- Available in 6 languages: Vietnamese, English, Portuguese (BR), Spanish, Indonesian, Arabic.

## Important note
Dralvo provides trading software and market/educational content only. It is not financial advice, it does not manage funds, and it does not guarantee profits. Trading XAUUSD and other leveraged instruments involves substantial risk of loss.
